com.jsyn.util

Class MultiChannelSynthesizer

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.util.MultiChannelSynthesizer

  • public class MultiChannelSynthesizer
extends java.lang.Object
    General purpose synthesizer with "channels" that could be used to implement a MIDI synthesizer. Each channel has: 
    
 lfo -> pitchToLinear -> [VOICES] -> volume* -> panner
 bend --/
    Note: this class is experimental and subject to change.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2016 Mobileer Inc

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MultiChannelSynthesizer()
      Construct a synthesizer with a maximum of 16 channels like MIDI.
      MultiChannelSynthesizer(int maxChannels) 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      double getMasterAmplitude() 
      UnitOutputPort getOutput() 
      void noteOff(int channel, int noteNumber, double amplitude)
      Turn off a note.
      void noteOff(int channel, int noteNumber, int velocity)
      Turn off a note.
      void noteOn(int channel, int noteNumber, double amplitude)
      Turn on a note.
      void noteOn(int channel, int noteNumber, int velocity)
      Turn on a note.
      void programChange(int channel, int program) 
      void setBendRange(int channel, double semitones) 
      void setMasterAmplitude(double masterAmplitude)
      Set amplitude for a single voice when the velocity is 127.
      void setPan(int channel, double pan)
      Pan from left to right.
      void setPitchBend(int channel, double offset)
      Set a pitch offset that will be scaled by the range for the channel.
      void setPressure(int channel, double pressure) 
      void setTimbre(int channel, double timbre) 
      void setup(Synthesizer synth, int startChannel, int numChannels, int voicesPerChannel, VoiceDescription voiceDescription)
      Specify a VoiceDescription to use with multiple channels.
      void setVibratoDepth(int channel, double semitones) 
      void setVolume(int channel, double volume)
      Set volume for entire channel.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MultiChannelSynthesizer

        public MultiChannelSynthesizer()
        Construct a synthesizer with a maximum of 16 channels like MIDI.

    • Method Detail

      • setup

        public void setup(Synthesizer synth,
                  int startChannel,
                  int numChannels,
                  int voicesPerChannel,
                  VoiceDescription voiceDescription)
        Specify a VoiceDescription to use with multiple channels.
        Parameters:
        synth -
        startChannel - channel index is zero based
        numChannels -
        voicesPerChannel -
        voiceDescription -

      • programChange

        public void programChange(int channel,
                          int program)

      • noteOff

        public void noteOff(int channel,
                    int noteNumber,
                    int velocity)
        Turn off a note.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        noteNumber -
        velocity - between 0 and 127, will be scaled by masterAmplitude

      • noteOff

        public void noteOff(int channel,
                    int noteNumber,
                    double amplitude)
        Turn off a note.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        noteNumber -
        amplitude - between 0 and 1.0, will be scaled by masterAmplitude

      • noteOn

        public void noteOn(int channel,
                   int noteNumber,
                   int velocity)
        Turn on a note.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        noteNumber -
        velocity - between 0 and 127, will be scaled by masterAmplitude

      • noteOn

        public void noteOn(int channel,
                   int noteNumber,
                   double amplitude)
        Turn on a note.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        noteNumber -
        amplitude - between 0 and 1.0, will be scaled by masterAmplitude

      • setPitchBend

        public void setPitchBend(int channel,
                         double offset)
        Set a pitch offset that will be scaled by the range for the channel.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        offset - ranges from -1.0 to +1.0

      • setBendRange

        public void setBendRange(int channel,
                         double semitones)

      • setPressure

        public void setPressure(int channel,
                        double pressure)

                            double semitones)

      • setTimbre

        public void setTimbre(int channel,
                      double timbre)

      • setVolume

        public void setVolume(int channel,
                      double volume)
        Set volume for entire channel.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        volume - normalized between 0.0 and 1.0

      • setPan

        public void setPan(int channel,
                   double pan)
        Pan from left to right.
        Parameters:
        channel -
        pan - ranges from -1.0 to +1.0

      • getOutput

        public UnitOutputPort getOutput()
        Returns:
        stereo output port

        public void setMasterAmplitude(double masterAmplitude)
        Set amplitude for a single voice when the velocity is 127.
